name: NI006 ATTR cardiomyopathy phase 1 trial
summary: A phase 1 randomized dose-escalation trial testing the anti-ATTR antibody NI006 for safety and amyloid-load biomarkers in ATTR cardiomyopathy.
population: 40 patients with wild-type or variant ATTR cardiomyopathy and chronic heart failure

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer through the peer-reviewed publication; ClinicalTrials.gov had no posted registry results section in the June 14, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Protein Aggregate Clearance because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in 40 patients with wild-type or variant ATTR cardiomyopathy and chronic heart failure. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
